log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable, likely a spreader, with an overlay. It has been analyzed in multiple sandboxes.
The sample does not appear to have any network activity, but it does have a registry persistence key. It also creates two processes.
The sample creates multiple processes, including WinRAR.exe and cmd.exe, and loads various DLLs. It does not create any mutexes.
The sample sets a persistence key in the registry, modifying the Winlogon shell value to include sIRC4.exe.
The sample does not drop any files.
